 </g>    </g></svg>
_For the highest grade, largest scale meme reproduction™️._

## What I can do
* (Up to) C0 inkjet plotting or printing
* 300dpi, 600dpi, 600dpi High-Quality, or 1400dpi Line Drawing
* Banner printing (infinite length in the Y axis up to 20 metres)
* Pricing the same regardless of colour or black & white
* Shipping either in-person or via Royal Mail Tube service - price on application
* Same-day turnaround / dispatch if possible & needed - no guarantees, please give me as much notice as possible!
## What I can't do
* Ultra-high-resolution photos, for gallery display etc
	* CMYK can put some pretty good quality out, but 12-colour professional photo printers are much better suited for that kind of task.
	* If you just want something to casually hang on your wall, my service should be fine.
* I can't guarantee colour accuracy
* Prints exceeding 20 metres in length, except in exceptional circumstances
## What gear I use
Canon iPF770 - A0, 5-ink continuous feed printer (CMY, PigK, K)
## Currently available media
* On Roll:
	* DIN C0 (aka A0 Oversize) - 917mm x (max 20m) - 80gsm
		* I can print landscape for A1 Oversize, or portrait for A0 Oversize.
		* I can also print to A0 or A1 scale, though there will be white borders that you'll have to trim.
	* A0 - 190gsm Satin
		* This is a heavyweight photo paper suitable for high quality, resilient photo prints. As such, it is significantly more expensive than your typical paper stock.
		* **Ordered on request** - please allow an extra few days.
	* A3 - 303mm x (max 20m) - 80gsm
		* I can print this borderless if desired.
		* I can print landscape for A4, or portrait for A3.
* On Sheets:
	* A3 Glossy Photo - 240gsm
		* High weight, glossy photo paper.
		* I can print this borderless if desired.
	* A4 Plain (duh) - 80gsm
		* Why you'd want this I have no idea
		* Seriously just use a printer

>[!info]
>I'm happy to consider stocking other types of media on request - it will depend on the initial outlay, how often I'm likely to use it, etcetera. Pricing on application.

## Pricing
**Excludes shipping**

| Stock                | Type                          | Price         | Price p/unit         |
| -------------------- | ----------------------------- | ------------- | -------------------- |
| DIN C0, 80gsm        | Documents / Line Drawings     | **£3 p/m**    | £3.50 A0, £2.75 A1   |
|                      | Photos / high ink utilisation | **£4 p/m**    | £4.75 A0, £3.66 A1   |
| DIN A0, 190gsm Satin | Photo prints                  | **£12 p/m**   | £15.45 A0, £10.93 A1 |
| A3, 80gsm            | Documents / Line Drawings     | **£1.50 p/m** | £0.63 A3, £0.45 A4   |
|                      | Photos / high ink utilisation | **£1.60 p/m** | £0.68 A3, £0.48 A4   |

## Formatting Information
Please send ideally as PDF in the desired scale, or vector (SVG etc). Raster images not of a sufficiently high quality / DPI will not be accepted - I'll talk you through it if this is a problem.

I can't take any responsibility for poor image quality if you send me poor source material.
